attempts.strategy: Extract the presheaf-side mate identity as a standalone axiom-clean driver: Adjunction.unit_app_unit_comp_map_η instantiated at the PresheafOfModules pullback-pushforward adjunction.
attempts.code_tried: lemma presheafUnit_comp_map_eta ... := by letI φ' := ...; haveI : (pushforward φ').IsRightAdjoint := (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction φ').isRightAdjoint; exact Adjunction.unit_app_unit_comp_map_η (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction φ')

next_steps: Add standalone lemma unitSquare : hsq via the documented 7-step telescope (transpose with homEquiv.injective, then steps 1–7 using unit_naturality, homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app, comp_unit_app, presheafUnit_comp_map_eta). Hardest sub-step is #3 (composite-adjunction homEquiv factorisation — verify exact form of (adj1.comp adj2).homEquiv first). Then close η-bridge as isIso_sheafifyEta_of_unitSquare f unitSquare and feed isIso_pullbackTensorMap_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta to finish D2'.
